name: 2'x3' Woven Accent Rug Black/Tan - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of elegant style to your floor with this 2-Foot x 3-Foot Woven Accent Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular accent rug showcases a tan surface framed by a black border. It's adorned with two oversized diamonds at the center and surrounded by other geometric designs, all in a contrasting black shade. Plus, it features a low-pile construction.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
